resolution: Credit promotion code was not entered at signup. Applied credit manually after verification.

subject: SSO login loop
description: After configuring SAML SSO, login redirects in a loop without completing.
resolution: ACS URL in IdP config had a trailing slash mismatch. Corrected URL. SSO working correctly.

subject: VM shows wrong timezone
description: System clock on VM is off by 35 hours. Services logging in wrong timezone.
resolution: Guided customer to set timezone: timedatectl set-timezone UTC. Advised using UTC for all servers.

subject: Object storage upload times out for large files
description: Uploading files over 5GB times out partway through.

subject: Auto-scaling not triggering scale-out
description: CPU consistently above 80% but scaling group is not adding VMs.
resolution: Scaling policy evaluation window was 30 minutes. Lowered to 5 minutes. Scale-out now triggers correctly.

subject: Cannot delete VM - shows error
description: Attempting to delete VM results in 'resource in use' error.
resolution: VM had an attached floating IP. Detached floating IP first, then deleted VM successfully.

subject: API rate limit hit unexpectedly
description: Application receiving 429 responses from Nirvana API during peak hours.
resolution: Application was polling VM status every second. Switched to webhook events. Rate limit no longer hit.

subject: Windows VM cannot activate
description: Windows Server VM showing activation error after launch.
resolution: Nirvana uses KMS activation on an internal server. Configured Windows KMS client key and pointed to internal KMS.

subject: Requesting P1 escalation for production outage
description: Production system is completely down. 5 customers affected. Revenue impact.
resolution: Escalated to Tier 4 engineering. Root cause: network switch failure in rack. VMs live-migrated. Resolved in 5 minutes.

subject: Data transfer between regions charged unexpectedly
description: Expected cross-region transfer to be free but being charged $0.02/GB.

subject: Cannot enable IPv6 on existing VPC
description: Option to enable IPv6 is greyed out on an existing VPC.
resolution: IPv6 can only be enabled on VPCs created after June 2024. Guided customer to create a new VPC with IPv6 enabled.

subject: Cannot log in after password reset
description: Customer reset password but login still fails with invalid credentials error.
resolution: Cleared auth cache and guided customer to log in via incognito window. Resolved.

subject: VM stuck in Pending state
description: Launched a gpu-small instance in ap-south-1; still shows Pending after 5 minutes.
resolution: Capacity was temporarily exhausted in ap-south-1. VM launched after manual intervention by ops team.

subject: SSH connection refused on port 22
description: Cannot SSH into VM after reboot. Getting 'Connection refused' on port 22.
resolution: Firewall rule for TCP 22 was inadvertently removed. Added rule back via dashboard.

subject: Volume not mounting after VM reboot
description: Attached volume /dev/vdb disappears after VM restart. Need to remount manually each time.
resolution: Added persistent mount entry to /etc/fstab: /dev/vdb /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2

subject: Account locked after failed login attempts
description: Customer locked out after 10 failed login attempts. Cannot reset password via email.
resolution: Unlocked account manually. Guided customer through password reset and 2FA setup.

subject: High outbound data transfer charges
description: Monthly bill is 5x higher than expected. Suspecting unexpected data transfer fees.
resolution: Found misconfigured backup job sending 2TB/day to S3-compatible endpoint. Fixed job config.

subject: GPU instance VRAM lower than spec
description: gpu-small shows 15GB VRAM instead of 16GB as advertised.
resolution: 1GB is reserved per GPU for ECC error correction. Documentation updated to clarify.

subject: Snapshot restore failed
description: Attempting to restore snapshot snap_13925 results in 'Restore failed' error.
resolution: Engineering investigated. Snapshot had filesystem corruption. Customer took new snapshot successfully.

subject: Cannot connect to VM after firewall rule change
description: Added a new firewall rule to restrict SSH. Now locked out completely.
resolution: Accessed VM via console and corrected firewall rules. Added a 'allow from admin IP' rule.

subject: VM paused unexpectedly on free tier
description: Free tier VM paused without warning after 18 days of activity.
resolution: Free tier VMs are paused after 30 days of inactivity. Customer restarted and upgraded to Pro.

subject: Payment method declined
description: Credit card is being declined on payment form even though card is valid.

subject: Slow disk I/O on Standard SSD volume
description: Database queries taking 2x longer than expected. Disk throughput appears throttled.
resolution: Standard SSD burst credits were exhausted. Upgraded customer to Performance SSD volume.

subject: MFA device lost, cannot log in
description: Lost phone with authenticator app. Cannot use backup codes (also lost).

subject: Kubernetes node not joining cluster
description: Added new node pool to NKS cluster. Nodes stay in NotReady state.
resolution: Incorrect kubeadm token. Ran 'kubeadm token create' and re-joined nodes. All nodes Ready.

subject: Object storage bucket returns 403
description: S3-compatible API returns 403 Forbidden on all GET requests to bucket.
resolution: Bucket ACL was set to private. Customer updated bucket policy to allow their service account.

subject: Load balancer health check failing
description: Backend VMs are healthy but load balancer shows them as unhealthy.
resolution: Health check path was /healthz but app serves /health. Updated health check path in LB config.

subject: Cannot resize VM - option greyed out
description: Resize option is greyed out in the dashboard for running VM.

subject: Terraform provider authentication error
description: Terraform apply fails with: 'invalid API key' even though key is correct.
resolution: API key had trailing newline in the environment variable. Fixed with: export NIRVANA_API_KEY=$(cat key.txt | tr -d '\n')

subject: DNS record not propagating
description: Updated A record 26 hours ago but domain still resolves to old IP.
resolution: Old TTL of 86400s was still in effect. Had to wait for TTL expiry. Lowered TTL to 300s going forward.

subject: Requesting refund for unused subscription
description: Customer cancelled service and wants a prorated refund for 27 unused days.
resolution: Per refund policy, prorated refund issued for unused days. Credit applied to payment method.

subject: VPN tunnel keeps dropping
description: Site-to-site VPN tunnel disconnects every 10 minutes. IKEv2 session expires.
resolution: IKE lifetime mismatch between Nirvana and customer router. Aligned to 28800s / 3600s. Stable since.

subject: Container image push fails with 401
description: Docker push to Nirvana Container Registry fails with 'unauthorized' error.
resolution: API key used for auth had expired. Generated new key and re-ran 'docker login'.

subject: High CPU alert not triggering
description: CPU has been at 100% for 5 minutes but no alert was received.
resolution: Alert evaluation window was set to 30 minutes. Customer lowered to 5 minutes. Alert fired correctly.

subject: Invoice shows incorrect company name
description: Company name on invoice is Nirvana Inc. instead of the legal entity name.
resolution: Updated organisation name in Settings → Profile. Reissued invoice with correct company name.

subject: SSH key rejected on existing VM
description: Added new SSH public key in settings but cannot log in with it on existing VM.
resolution: SSH keys must be associated at VM creation time. Guided customer to create snapshot and relaunch.

subject: Spot instance interrupted during training
description: ML training job interrupted due to spot instance reclamation. Lost 4 hours of progress.
resolution: Advised enabling checkpointing every 30 minutes and using a persistent volume for checkpoints.

subject: Network latency between VMs is high
description: Ping between two VMs in same region is 40ms. Expected <5ms.

subject: Webhook not receiving events
description: Configured webhook endpoint but not receiving any events after 41 hours.
resolution: Endpoint was returning 500 on Nirvana's test event. After fixing endpoint, events arrived within seconds.

subject: Outbound email from VM being rejected
description: Emails sent from VM on port 25 are rejected by receiving mail servers.

subject: Kubernetes PVC stuck in Pending
description: PersistentVolumeClaim stays Pending. Pod cannot schedule.
resolution: StorageClass was not set to 'nirvana-block'. Updated PVC manifest with correct storageClassName.

subject: Free tier credit not applied
description: Account shows $0 credits despite signing up within trial period.
resolution: Credit promotion code was not entered at signup. Applied credit manually after verification.

subject: SSO login loop
description: After configuring SAML SSO, login redirects in a loop without completing.
resolution: ACS URL in IdP config had a trailing slash mismatch. Corrected URL. SSO working correctly.
